params.name: Ivory Senet Game Set
params.description: The Ivory Senet Game Set is a precious artifact from the New Kingdom period of ancient Egypt, currently housed in the Metropolitan Museum of Art in New York. It is part of the popular Senet game in ancient Egypt, typically consisting of a board, pieces, and dice. The dice include elongated stick shapes and knucklebone shapes, using their different four-sided shapes to determine the movement of the pieces. The Senet game was not only a form of entertainment but also held religious and divinatory  …
